level_signals: 6+ years of product management or product-focused founder experience
Expected to own product strategy, roadmap, and business metrics
External representation with VCs, accelerators, and partners

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of product management or product-focused founder experience.
Shipped user-facing or API products, built on complex technical systems running at scale.
An AI enthusiast and experimenter. Someone who is willing to upend their workflows for something that works 2x better.
Passion for helping founders build their businesses.
Persistence and a whatever-it-takes approach to ensure that your product is successful.
Strong written and verbal communication skills with a talent for precise articulations of customer problems.
Adept with data and confident in how best to measure user impact.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Founder background, or experience in a very early stage company environment.
Software engineering experience, a computer science or engineering degree, or similar technical experience.

scope.surface: Stripe Atlas and other startup products helping founders start and run a company globally
scope.business_model: B2B, serving early-stage startup founders and companies
primary_metrics_inferred: Product and business metrics for Atlas
User experience quality (founders reaching product-market fit)
core_responsibilities: Deeply understand the needs of startup founders and learn how they use Atlas and other startup products
Stay at the front of the ever changing technology landscape, ensuring we are building where founders are and with tools they want to use
Drive product development in collaboration with engineering counterparts by setting the pace, prioritizing ruthlessly, and unblocking execution
Craft product experiences that are both simple and powerful, with surprisingly great details
Contribute to our product strategy and own delivery of product and business metrics
Work collaboratively with internal stakeholders and deliver clear communication on statuses, priorities, and landed impact
Represent Atlas externally with founders, venture capitalists, accelerators, and partners
Develop and maintain metrics to help us understand product performance
Ensure that every user has a great experience with Atlas

green_flags: Clear product surface and mission — Stripe Atlas with explicit founder-focused impact
JD encourages application if minimum requirements are met even without preferred qualifications
External-facing role with meaningful ecosystem partnerships (VCs, accelerators)
Strong company brand and mission ('increase the GDP of the internet')
red_flags: No location or remote eligibility stated — unclear where this role is based
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned
Posting first seen and last updated dates unavailable — unclear how fresh this role is

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 6+ years requirement and scope of responsibilities)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description targeting startup founders)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.type (marked unclear; no location information provided in JD)

'6+ years of product management or product-focused founder experience' — the 'or founder experience' clause makes this hard to classify purely as PM tenure; treated as a single combined requirement
